label: KILOS Comp Audit Source Element Target Plan

capture_scope.policy: Capture only the named slide, PDF, or SPA page elements. Do not capture whole pages or whole browser viewports unless a later reviewed target explicitly narrows the element to that full visible component.

source_artifact_refs.notes: Editable source deck reference; use for slide object intent and layout vocabulary, not as a generated output.
Rendered 47-page slide reference used to identify precise page regions and expected element clips.
Interactive Employer Brand Competitive Audit SPA reference with KILOS, summary, competition, and deep-dive views.

page_element_target.element_ref: assessment bullet list under 'During the assessment, we considered'
page_element_target.natural_language_target: Clip the bullet list describing audited surfaces and assessment dimensions, excluding the title, surrounding whitespace, and page number.

acceptance_criteria: The clip includes all bullets for messaging, tone, campaigns, job listings, social channels, reviews, and awards.
The clip excludes the full slide frame and does not include unrelated deck chrome.
The text extract preserves the scope list as separate bullet-like entries.
targets.notes: This is source-method context, not report content.

page_element_target.element_ref: four labeled narrative blocks: Shared themes, Differences, Where messaging gaps exist, Visual identity
page_element_target.natural_language_target: Clip each labeled narrative block as its own element so downstream data can preserve the source distinction between shared themes, differentiators, gaps, and visual identity.

acceptance_criteria: Exactly four clips are produced, one per labeled block.
Each clip includes its label and body text.
No clip includes the entire slide or another labeled block.
targets.notes: This target forces block-level capture instead of a single full-slide screenshot.

page_element_target.artifact_location: PDF page 5, 'Employer brand messaging snapshot insights'
page_element_target.natural_language_target: Clip the messaging snapshot table body that pairs companies with headlines and example positioning copy.

acceptance_criteria: The clip includes the table headers and all visible company rows on the page.
The clip preserves headline-to-company alignment.
The clip does not include adjacent page number or unrelated margins.
targets.notes: Useful for normalizing headline and example-copy fields.

page_element_target.element_ref: KILOS dimension matrix with Kinship, Impact, Lifestyle, Opportunity, and Status columns
page_element_target.natural_language_target: Clip the KILOS top-themes matrix as the matrix element only, preserving the five KILOS column headings and visible theme labels.

acceptance_criteria: The clip includes all five KILOS column headings.
The clip preserves matrix rows and score markers well enough to trace theme placement.
The clip is not a full-page grab.
targets.notes: Later automation may need PDF crop coordinates rather than DOM locators.

page_element_target.artifact_location: PPTX source deck, corresponding rendered pages 2, 4, 5, and 6
page_element_target.element_ref: source slide objects behind method, summary, snapshot, and KILOS matrix pages
page_element_target.natural_language_target: Record the editable deck as the structural source for the same precise element targets found in the rendered PDF; do not create slide exports.

acceptance_criteria: The target points back to editable slide objects as source structure.
No screenshot, deck export, or generated slide artifact is produced.
Later extraction fields remain nullable until a PPTX object parser or codegen pass fills them.
targets.notes: Expected clip count is zero because the rendered PDF carries the visual clip targets.

page_element_target.element_ref: top navigation buttons for Overview, Summary, Competition, KILOS, and deep-dive company entry
page_element_target.natural_language_target: Clip the sticky header navigation element that controls the SPA views.

acceptance_criteria: The clip includes the visible view controls and enough header context to identify the audit surface.
The clip does not include the full browser viewport.
The active-view styling is visible for the selected state used during capture.
targets.notes: Later Playwright can target #main-header or generated button text after review.

page_element_target.element_ref: introductory audit preamble and methodology explanation components
page_element_target.natural_language_target: Clip the intro and methodology cards/elements separately after the Overview view has rendered.

acceptance_criteria: Exactly two clips are produced: one for the audit introduction and one for methodology/framework context.
The method clip includes the KILOS framework explanation when visible.
Neither clip includes the whole overview page.
targets.notes: The SPA currently renders this content from data near introContent.auditPreamble.

page_element_target.element_ref: Competitive Landscape logo grid linking to all company deep dives
page_element_target.natural_language_target: Clip the logo grid element that shows the complete company set represented by the SPA.

acceptance_criteria: The clip includes the grid title and all visible company logo tiles.
The clip excludes the rest of the competition page if additional sections are present.
The company count can vary in later audits; this target is a repeated-grid element, not a fixed company schema.
targets.notes: SPv5 currently derives the grid from allCompanies.

page_element_target.natural_language_target: Clip the KILOS matrix element after switching to the KILOS view.

acceptance_criteria: The clip includes the KILOS matrix title and table content.
The clip preserves company columns and KILOS dimension grouping.
The clip is scoped to #kilos-matrix, not the full KILOS page.
targets.notes: The HTML source already names this element with id="kilos-matrix" but the reviewed selector field remains null in V0.

page_element_target.artifact_location: SPv5.html, each rendered company deep-dive KILOS Framework Analysis block
page_element_target.element_ref: accordion panels for Kinship, Impact, Lifestyle, Opportunity, and Status
page_element_target.natural_language_target: For a selected company deep dive, open and clip one accordion panel for each KILOS dimension.

acceptance_criteria: Exactly five clips are produced for the selected company: Kinship, Impact, Lifestyle, Opportunity, and Status.
Each clip includes the dimension label, summary, and supporting evidence when present.
Clips are accordion-panel scoped and do not include the entire company deep-dive section.
targets.notes: Later deterministic runs can repeat this target for arbitrary n companies.

page_element_target.element_ref: one rendered company section card per allCompanies item
page_element_target.natural_language_target: Clip each generated company deep-dive card as a separate element, preserving the company logo/header, value proposition, KILOS analysis column, and evidence column boundaries.

acceptance_criteria: One clip is produced for each rendered company deep-dive section in SPv5.
The clip count is data-driven by the rendered company set; SPv5 currently has 13 company sections.
Each clip is section scoped and not a full-page or full-viewport screenshot.
targets.notes: This target is the explicit arbitrary-n company repeated element target.

page_element_target.artifact_location: SPv5.html, Evidence Gallery card inside each company deep dive
page_element_target.element_ref: active carousel image frame and source-domain tabs
page_element_target.natural_language_target: For each company with visual evidence, clip the active evidence-gallery frame and visible source-domain tabs as an element.

acceptance_criteria: One active-gallery clip is produced per company with an evidence gallery.
Each clip includes the active image frame, carousel controls, and source-domain tabs.
The clip does not include the entire company deep-dive section.
targets.notes: If a later source data set has companies without images, this target's expected count must be reviewed.

page_element_target.artifact_location: SPv5.html, rendered citation controls from citeList() and cite()
page_element_target.element_ref: purple citation bubbles, '+', and related source-link controls attached to evidence text
page_element_target.natural_language_target: Clip a representative citation-control cluster showing numbered source bubbles and expansion affordance.

acceptance_criteria: The clip includes at least one numbered citation bubble and the related expansion control when present.
The text extract identifies the source URL or citation index relationship when visible.
The clip is scoped to the citation cluster, not the whole paragraph or page.
targets.notes: This supports later citation normalization without committing to a report renderer.
